bird.name: Oʻahu ʻelepaio
bird.summary: The Oʻahu ʻelepaio (Chasiempis ibidis) is a monarch flycatcher endemic to the Hawaiian Island of Oʻahu. It is one of the three distinct, cl…

locations.name: 夏威夷群島
locations.summary: 夏威夷群島（英語：Hawaiian Islands），舊稱桑威奇群岛、山域治埃蘭（Sandwich Islands），太平洋中北部的岛群，波利尼西亚群岛的一部分，是由19個较大的島嶼和其他小岛組成的群島，成因多为火山岛或珊瑚岛。 夏威夷群…

locations.name: 歐胡島
locations.summary: 瓦胡岛 （夏威夷語：Oʻahu，英語：Oahu，/oʊˈɑːhuː/），又譯為欧胡岛，或被称为“聚集之岛”，或“奧雅胡”，是夏威夷群島中面積第三大的島嶼，也是群島中人口最多的島嶼，聚集了夏威夷州总人口的大约三分之二。夏威夷州首府所在地檀香…

relations.subject: Oʻahu ʻelepaio
relations.evidence: |date=2009 |title=Importance of Nest Predation by Alien Rodents and Avian Poxvirus in Conservation of Oahu Elepaio |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/40208434 |journal=The Journal of Wildlife Management |volume=73 |issue=5 |pages=737–746 |doi=10.2193/2008-284 |jstor=40208434 |bibcode=2009JWMan..73..737V |issn=0022-541X |via=JSTOR}} It is one of the three distinct, closely related species of elepaio native to the Hawaiian archipelago, including the Hawaii elepaio and the Kaui elepaio.{{Cite journal |last1=VanderWerf |first1=Eric A

relations.subject: Oʻahu ʻelepaio
relations.evidence: |date=2007 |title=Biogeography of 'Elepaio: Evidence from Inter-Island Song Playbacks |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/20456016 |journal=The Wilson Journal of Ornithology |volume=119 |issue=3 |pages=325–333 |doi=10.1676/06-015.1 |jstor=20456016 |issn=1559-4491}} They are found in high elevations on the slopes of Oahu{{Cite journal |last1=Vanderwerf |first1=Eric A
